mnemonics: LOCK IT UP (Locking, Interrupts, Timeouts, Understanding, Prevention) - A reminder for the key principles of avoiding deadlock.
keyPoints: Synchronization mechanisms like mutexes and semaphores are required to prevent race conditions.
Deadlock occurs when processes are waiting for resources held by each other, forming a circular chain.
Proper coordination ensures correct execution order and data consistency across threads/processes.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to release a lock after a critical section, causing a deadlock.
Using inadequate or incorrect synchronization, leading to race conditions and inconsistent data.
